name: Mocha Crumb Cake
recipeIngredient: Package Pillsbury Plus Butter Recipe Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a 13 x 9-inch (13 x 9 inches) pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine all cake ingredients at low speed until moistened; beat for 2 minutes at the highest speed.
4. Pour batter into prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. In a small saucepan, melt 3 tablespoons butter; stir in remaining topping ingredients.
7. Spread topping mixture over hot cake.
8. Broil 6 inches from heat for 1-2 minutes or until topping is bubbly.
9. Serve warm or cool.
Makes 12 servings.
